title: Line 48400 – Refund - Canada.ca
content:
Generally, the CRA does not refund a difference of $2 or less .
You can ask the CRA to transfer your refund to your 2026 instalment account when you file your return electronically or by attaching a note to your paper return.
Direct deposit is a fast, convenient, and secure way to receive your CRA payments directly in your account at a financial institution in Canada. For more information and ways to enrol, go to Direct deposit or contact your financial institution.

## Completing your tax return
Subtract the amount on line 48200 of your return from the amount on line 43500 of your return.
If the result is negative , you have a refund. Enter this amount on line 48400 of your return.
